title: Libinhania arachnoides
taxonomy: Libinhania arachnoides is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae. It belongs to the genus Libinhania. The species is native to the Himalayan region and other parts of Asia. The classification of Libinhania arachnoides is further divided into the kingdom Plantae and the clade Angiosperms. Within the Acanthaceae family, Libinhania arachnoides is closely related to other species of plants in the same genus.
uses: Libinhania arachnoides, a species of flowering plant, has been studied for its potential medicinal properties. Traditionally, it has been used to treat various health issues, including fever, digestive problems, and respiratory infections.
